ja_transcribed: [私|わたし]たちと[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[行|い]きませんか。
en: Will you go with us?

ja_transcribed: [二人|ふたり]の[兄弟|きょう|だい]は[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[旅|たび]に[出|で]た。
en: Two brothers set out on a journey together.

ja_transcribed: [今度|こん|ど][一緒|いっ|しょ]にボウリング[行|い]こう。
en: Let's go bowling together sometime soon.

ja_transcribed: [今度|こん|ど][一緒|いっ|しょ]にカラオケ[行|い]かない？
en: Do you want to go to karaoke together sometime?

ja_transcribed: トムはイルカと[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[泳|およ]いだ。
en: Tom swam with the dolphins.

ja_transcribed: [娘|むすめ]は[私|わたし]と[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[住|す]んでいます。
en: My daughter lives with me.

ja_transcribed: トムと[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[出|で]かけてくるね。
en: I'm going out with Tom.

ja_transcribed: トムと[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[行|い]くつもりなの？
en: Are you going to go with Tom?

ja_transcribed: [私|わたし]と[一緒|いっ|しょ]にいたほうがいいよ。
en: You should stay with me.

ja_transcribed: [小|ちい]さい[鏡|かがみ]を[買|か]いたいんだけど。
en: I'd like to buy a small mirror.

ja_transcribed: [多分|た|ぶん]、[一緒|いっ|しょ]にした[方|ほう]がいいよ。
en: Perhaps we should do that together.

ja_transcribed: [一緒|いっ|しょ]に[映画|えい|が]を[観|み]に[行|い]きたいな。
en: I want to go with you to the movies.
I want to go to the movies with you.

ja_transcribed: トムは、[眼鏡|め|がね]してなかったよ。
en: Tom wasn't wearing his glasses.

ja_transcribed: [一緒|いっ|しょ]にパンを[買|か]いに[行|い]きたい。
en: I want to go out with you to get some bread.
I want to go out with you to get some pastries.

ja_transcribed: トムはマンタと[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[泳|およ]いだ。
en: Tom swam with the manta rays.

ja_transcribed: [著作|ちょ|さく][権|けん]と[言|い]えば、トムでしょ！
en: If talking about copyright, I guess we need Tom!
When talking about copyright, I guess we need Tom!
If we're talking about copyright, I suppose we need Tom!

ja_transcribed: [悪|わる]いけど、[一緒|いっ|しょ]には[行|い]けない。
en: Sorry, but I can't go with you.

ja_transcribed: [晩|ばん]ご[飯|はん]をご[一緒|いっ|しょ]にどうですか？
en: Would you like to have dinner with me?

ja_transcribed: お[母|かあ]さんと[一緒|いっ|しょ]にお[住|す]まいよ。
en: He lives with his mother.

ja_transcribed: [二人|ふたり]は[一緒|いっ|しょ]にいる[時間|じ|かん]が[長|なが]い。
en: They spend a lot of time together.

ja_transcribed: トムと[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[住|す]んでるんです。
en: I live with Tom.

ja_transcribed: みんなで[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[歌|うた]を[歌|うた]います。
en: We'll all sing together.
We're all going to sing together.
They all sing together.
Everyone sings together.

ja_transcribed: [家|いえ]で[家族|か|ぞく]と[一緒|いっ|しょ]にいなさいよ。
en: You should be home with your family.
Stay at home with your family.

ja_transcribed: トムと[一緒|いっ|しょ]にやるつもりなの？
en: Do you intend to do that with Tom?
Are you planning on doing this with Tom?

ja_transcribed: [時間|じ|かん]があるなら[一緒|いっ|しょ]に[来|き]てよ。
en: If you have the time, come along with me.
If you have time, come with me.

ja_transcribed: [昨日|きのう]から[眼鏡|め|がね]が[見当|み|あ]たらない。
en: I can't find my glasses since yesterday.
